subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One, that which thou didst address to His honor Áqá Siyyid Taqí hath been perused. Rest thou assured in the bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق آنچه بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید مطمئن بفضل و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
